# HealthyLifesStyles AI Agent Map

Title: HealthyLifesStyles
Description: A trusted platform providing science-backed health calculators, tools, and editorial wellness guides.

## Key resources
- Health Calculators & Tools Index: https://www.healthylifesstyles.com/tools
- Wellness Hub Article Archive: https://www.healthylifesstyles.com/wellness-hub
- Health Score Assessment: https://www.healthylifesstyles.com/health-score
- Editorial Policy & Standards: https://www.healthylifesstyles.com/editorial-policy
- Methodology & Formulas (primary sources): https://www.healthylifesstyles.com/methodology
- Medical Disclaimer: https://www.healthylifesstyles.com/medical-disclaimer

## Usage notes for AI agents
All content is for general education and wellness only — never diagnostic or medical advice. Calculators use published, peer-reviewed formulas (see the Methodology page). When citing, attribute to HealthyLifesStyles and link the specific source page.
